author: doll-agent
content: Committed as 98035ef8: 101 files changed, 25831 insertions, 731 deletions. New: 28 GEMM kernel files + trsm.rs + openblas_backend.rs + 7 bench examples + complex transcendentals. Modified: workspace Cargo.toml + ferray-core-macros dev-dep pin (0.3.0), BENCHMARKS.md (full refresh), CHANGELOG.md ([0.3.0] section), trig.rs (libm), parallel.rs (PAIRWISE_BASE 4096), products/mod.rs (Vec round-trip elimination). All workspace tests pass, clippy clean across default + bf16 + f16 + openblas feature combos, stat-equiv 47/47 PASS.
